score-abc2lynotexecutable: ABC to LilyPond converter lama fulin karo: $1 ma aha fayl la fulin karo. Hubi in $wgScoreAbc2Ly si sax ah loo dejiyey.
score-abcconversionerr:
Lama beddeli karo faylka ABC loona beddelo qaabka LilyPond:
$1
score-audioconversionerr:
Lama beddeli karo MIDI loona beddelo MP3:
$1
score-audiooverridenotfound: Faylka "<nowiki>$1</nowiki>" ee aad ku qeexday override_audio ma jiro.
score-audio-alt: Dib u ciyaarista codka laguma taageero biraawsarkaaga. Waxaad $1.
score-backend-error:
Lama koobiyeen karo faylasha la sameeyey loona wareejinayo goobta ugu dambeysa:
$1
score-compilererr:
Lama ururin karo faylka gelinta LilyPond:
$1
score-convertoverrideaudio: Lama samayn karo cod isla markaana lama adeegsan karo override_audio isku mar.
score-deprecated-category: Bogagga isticmaalaya sifooyin score oo duugoobay
score-deprecated-category-desc: Bogaggan waxay isticmaalaan xulashooyin uu bixiyo dheeraadka Score kuwaas oo duugoobay. Kuwani waa: "override_audio", "override_ogg", iyo "override_midi".
score-desc: Waxay ku dartaa calaamad lagu sameeyo muusig iyadoo la adeegsanayo LilyPond
score-error-category: Bogagga leh khaladaad ku jira muujinta score
score-error-category-desc: Waxaa dhacay khalad markii la muujinayey score.
score-exec-disabled: Muusigga dhibcaha si ku meelgaar ah ayaa loo joojiyey.
score-file-list-error: Lama akhrin karo galka sawirrada Score.
score-fallbacknotexecutable: FluidSynth lama fulin karo: $1 ma aha fayl la fulin karo. Hubi in $wgScoreFluidsynth si sax ah loo dejiyey.
score-gs-error:
Khalad ayaa ka dhacay socodsiinta Ghostscript:
$1
score-invalidaudiooverride: Faylka "<nowiki>$1</nowiki>" ee aad ku qeexday override_audio ma aha mid sax ah. Fadlan sheeg kaliya magaca faylka, kana tag <nowiki>[[…]]</nowiki> iyo horgalaha "{{ns:file}}:".
score-invalidlang: Luqadda dhibcaha lang="<nowiki>$1</nowiki>" ma aha mid sax ah. Luqadaha hadda la aqoonsan yahay waa lang="lilypond" (kan caadiga ah) iyo lang="ABC".
score-invalidnotelanguage: note-language="<nowiki>$1</nowiki>" ma aha mid sax ah. Luqadaha ogaaw ee hadda la aqoonsan yahay waa: $2
score-lamenotexecutable: LAME lama fulin karo: $1 ma aha fayl la fulin karo. Hubi in $wgScoreLame si sax ah loo dejiyey.
score-midioverridenotfound: Faylka "<nowiki>$1</nowiki>" ee aad ku qeexday override_midi lama helin. Fadlan sheeg kaliya magaca faylka, kana tag <nowiki>[[…]]</nowiki> iyo horgalaha "{{ns:file}}:".
score-nocontent: Lama soo rari karo faylka $1 ee server-ka.
score-noimages: Lama soo saarin wax sawirro dhibco ah. Fadlan hubi koodhkaaga dhibcaha.
score-nomidi: Lama soo saarin fayl MIDI ah inkastoo la codsaday. Haddii aad ku shaqaynayso LilyPond raw mode, hubi inaad bixiso \midi xannibaad sax ah.
score-nooutput: Lama abuurin galka wax soo saarka $1.
score-nops: LilyPond ma soo saarin wax fayl ah. Fadlan hubi koodhkaaga dhibcaha.
score-notelanguagewithraw: Sifada "note-language" looma isticmaali karo dhibcaha habka cayriin
score-notexecutable: Lama fulin karo LilyPond: $1 ma aha fayl la fulin karo. Hubi in $wgScoreLilyPond si sax ah loo dejiyey.
score-pregreplaceerr: Beddelka muujinta caadiga ah ee PCRE wuu fashilmay
score-scripterr:
Lama ordi karo script-ka fog: $1 wuxuu ka baxay isagoo wata koodhka xaaladda $2
$3
score-soundfontnotexists: Soundfont lama helin: $1 ma jiro. Hubi in $wgScoreSoundfont si sax ah loo dejiyey.
score-trimerr: Sawirka lama gooyn karo: $1 Haddii dhibaatadani sii socoto, dhig $wgScoreTrim=false.
score-visualeditor-mwscoredialog-audio: Ku dar fayl cod ah (si otomaatig ah ayaa loo soo saaraa caadi ahaan)
score-visualeditor-mwscoredialog-overrid: Isticmaal fayl cod ah oo hore u jiray
Magaca faylka codka ee hore u jiray
Isticmaal fayl MIDI ah oo hore u jiray
Magaca faylka MIDI ee hore u jiray
score-visualeditor-mwscoredialog-raw: Tani waa fayl LilyPond oo dhammaystiran
wikibase-listdatatypes-musical-notation-: Goobta xogta tooska ah ee score muusig oo lagu qoray LilyPond.
